page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9i.8xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. The instance provides 32 dedicated physical cores with 32 vCPUs, configured with a single thread per core. This dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource sharing at the thread level.

The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. This memory density makes the instance suitable for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local storage, as the instance features no bundled local storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 20 Gbps, facilitating efficient data transfer for distributed environments.

Given the high memory capacity relative to the CPU cores, the ecs.r9i.8xlarge offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring large in-memory datasets without the overhead of local disk maintenance. The absence of local storage and GPU acceleration represents a clear tradeoff, positioning this server specifically for memory-bound processing. It is well-suited for workloads such as in-memory databases, caching layers, enterprise applications, and large-scale data processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9i.8xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. Running on the KVM hypervisor, it features 32 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 32 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.2 GHz. The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high resource density of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps. This hardware profile offers a qualitative cost-efficient balance for memory-bound applications that do not require local disk performance or hardware acceleration. The ecs.r9i.8xlarge is suited for in-memory databases, large-scale caching, and enterprise application hosting.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9i.8xlarge is a memory-optimized KVM instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB of RAM, and 20 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized x86 server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and high memory density for demanding enterprise workloads.

256.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for efficient data transfer
